openFindings.title: Recycle stress re-models the production replay path instead of driving it
README proxy replay boundary is mislabeled as read-only
013 continuity surfaces still disagree on active and deployed state
EX-037 requires includeEmbeddings, but the strict MCP surface rejects that parameter
EX-037 says to restore into a scratch copy, but checkpoint_restore has no per-call scratch DB target
Error-code catalog still documents active E429 scan-rate-limit rejections after coalesced success replaced them
ServerInfo traceability still cites the pre-fix 1.7.2 value
Durability README claims checkpoint catalog stays bounded after v2 restores
EX-039 overstates when move reconciliation will fire
Checkpoint stress assertion masks a missing snapshotFormat return field
Enrichment stress overstates backfill coverage for deferred marker rows
004 checklist summary marks P2 complete while deferred P2 rows remain unchecked
Parent graph metadata retains stale In Progress entity after the packet is complete
013/001 changelog can be read as globally removing -32001 while deployed runtime still emits it
001/002 non-checklist docs still carry setup-era completion metadata
Setup-era checklist frontmatter conflicts with completed child continuity
Feature catalog labels the proxy replayable set as read-mostly even though memory_save is replayable

deferred: EX-038 direct DB marker setup command specificity
full per-file docs readability sweep beyond highest-value roots

searchDebt.rationale: Graph answers were not trusted because readiness was stale; direct reads and exact searches covered selected high-risk targets instead.
Graph answers were not trusted because readiness was stale; direct reads and exact searches covered assigned high-risk targets.
underspecified setup exists, but this pass did not prove the scenario is impossible rather than missing a manual DB-operation precondition
searchDebt.reason: needs a focused pass on whether manual playbook scenarios require explicit sqlite3/operator commands for DB-row fixtures

searchDebt.rationale: Trusted graph traversal was not available; direct reads and exact searches covered this docs-focused slice.
The prompt restricts this parallel slice to the configured reviewScopeFiles and tells reviewers not to report prior or out-of-scope issues as new findings.
searchDebt.reason: Requires a separate review slice or expanded scope before adjudication.
